description_long: This is a large, cubic cardboard shipping box with a natural brown kraft paper finish, featuring printed branding and product information. The box is labeled 'BIO Equitable' and 'MENAËD Sirop de Menthe', indicating it contains organic mint syrup. The exterior is covered with various logos, certifications, and product details in French, including fair trade and organic symbols. One side prominently displays a green and white product label with an image of mint leaves, while other sides are filled with text and smaller logos. The box appears sturdy, with reinforced edges and a sealed top, suitable for shipping or storage in urban environments.
description: A large, brown cardboard shipping box labeled for organic mint syrup, covered with branding, logos, and product details in French.
description_view_0: This view shows the 'BIO Equitable' logo and a large block of product information text, with minimal branding elements.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main product label 'MENAËD Sirop de Menthe' with a green mint image and prominent branding.
description_view_2: This side displays additional product details, the MENAËD logo, and more French text, with less visual emphasis on the main label.
description_view_3: This view features a dense cluster of certification logos and a large block of text, with no prominent product imagery.
